title: Healthtech
description: Growth strategy for health, wellness, and clinical products where credibility has to come before scale.
buyerProblem: Health buyers need safety, evidence, and clarity. Generic startup marketing usually moves too fast and proves too little.
usefulWhen: You need to speak to clinicians, patients, buyers, or partners
Your category is sensitive, regulated, or behaviour-change heavy
You need stronger proof before scaling acquisition
proof: eQuoo case study: growth strategy for a mental health game
Experience in healthtech, mental health, and wellness positioning
